data.name: My Life In A Monster Girl Paradise
data.detailed_description:
Did you ever wondered how your life would be with a monster girl harem? Now it’s time to hunt.

My Life In A Monster Girl Paradise is a monster girl collector combined with dating/marriage and pregnancy content 2D Hentai game.

Venture to a secluded island, where 14 seductive monster girls await, each ready to capture your heart and fulfill your deepest desires.

Defend yourself and figure out each monster girl's weakness, but watch out! If you can't resist their tempting ways, you might end up completely drained by their allure.
Pick the girl who catches your eye and take her on a date. Who knows, you might just end up spending a wild night at her place.

Tie the knot with your one true love, or go all in and build your own harem.

Experience intimate moments that could lead to pregnancy and even more wild, passionate nights together
Summary:Explote the island, fight and form friendship with monster girls. take them out to a date or marriage, or just go straight to the bed with them. if your love is deep enough there is pregnancy content as well.


Did the description awaken your horny curiosity? If so, make sure to add the game to your wishlist so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to start building your monster girl harem.

data.short_description: Explore the island, meet 14 sexy monster girls, and let their charms pull you in. Build your harem and take things further. maybe impregnate them!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x900 the Game Default Display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
